chapter_title.en: Chapter on Livelihoods, Earnings, Profits, and Professions

text: 3625 - وَ رَوَى أَبُو هِشَامٍ اَلْبَصْرِيُّ عَنْ اَلرِّضَا عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ قَالَ : "مِنَ اَلْفَسَادِ قَطْعُ اَلدِّرْهَمِ وَ اَلدِّينَارِ وَ طَرْحُ اَلنَّوَى ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3625 - Abu Hisham al-Basri narrated from Imam Ali ibn Musa Ar-Ridha (as) that he said:
"Among the causes of corruption are the discontinuation of currency (dirham and dinar) and the discarding of date pits."
